content: PostgresStore tiered knowledge implementation (Issue #26, PR #50): Added 8 tiered knowledge columns (memory_type, confidence, tier, tier_changed_at, retention_score, pinned, pinned_by, pinned_at) via idempotent ALTER TABLE migrations. Replaced full HNSW index with partial index on tier IN ('hot', 'warm') — PostgreSQL automatically manages index membership when tier changes, no manual rebuild needed. Default search filters to hot+warm tiers; search_with_cold() uses tier != 'forgotten' for forward compatibility. update_tier() validates entry existence via rows_affected check. Pinned entry deserialization warns on incomplete metadata instead of fabricating timestamps. 9 new tests (20 total PG tests), all passing.
